nasb.text: Moses spoke to the people, saying, “Arm men from among you for the war, that they may go against Midian to execute the Lord’s vengeance on Midian.

esv.text: So Moses spoke to the people, saying, “Arm men from among you for the war, that they may go against Midian to execute the Lord’s vengeance on Midian.

cnv.text: 摩西對人民說：“要從你們中間使一些人武裝起來去作戰，攻擊米甸人，好在米甸人身上為耶和華報仇。

ccb.text: 于是，摩西对民众说：“你们男子要拿起兵器去攻打米甸，为耶和华报仇。
